# DENA'S Persian Fusion Restaurant

> Authentic Persian fusion restaurant in Den Haag, Netherlands. Family-run, founded by Dena, serving home-style Persian dishes made with Dutch seasonal produce.

## About

DENA'S Persian Fusion Restaurant is located at Prinsestraat 62, 2513 CE Den Haag, Netherlands. It was founded by Dena, who spent decades cooking Persian food for her family in Iran before emigrating to the Netherlands. Before opening the restaurant, she ran a catering service preparing over 50,000 meals for schools.

The restaurant is family-run. Dena cooks. Kasper welcomes guests. Lars helps wherever needed.

The cuisine is Persian Fusion: traditional Persian recipes (Ghormeh Sabzi, Fesenjan, Zereshk Polo, Khoresh Bademjan, Baghali Polo) combined with fresh Dutch seasonal produce and local influences. Persian food is aromatic rather than spicy — complexity comes from sour-sweet balance (pomegranate, dried lime, barberries) and long slow cooking.

Operated by: The Happy Food Services B.V., KvK 96854197

## Contact

- Address: Prinsestraat 62, 2513 CE Den Haag, Netherlands
- Phone: +31 6 27481111
- Email: info@dena-restaurant.com

- Order online (Uber Eats): https://ubereats.com/nl/store/dena/peMmkNp3SySgoK-oHsEBVA

## Opening Hours

- Tuesday–Thursday: 11:00–19:00
- Friday–Saturday: 11:00–22:00
- Sunday: 11:00–19:00
- Monday: Closed

## Menu Highlights

**Lunch:**
- Kotlet (Persian meat patty sandwich) €9.50
- Kuku Sabzi (herb frittata sandwich) €8.50
- Fish Tartare sandwich €12.50

**Dinner starters:**
- Kotlet €9.50
- Kuku Sabzi €8.50
- Fish Tartare €12.50
- Mast-o Moosir (yogurt with shallot and dill) €6.50
- Torshi (pickled vegetables) €5.50

**Dinner mains:**
- Fesenjoon (walnut stew with duck breast, pomegranate molasses) €28.00
- Baghali Polo (fava bean and dill rice with lamb) €37.50
- Khoresh Bademjan (Persian lamb stew with eggplant and tomato) €27.50
- Zereshk Polo (saffron jeweled rice with barberries and chicken) €29.00
- Oven Grilled Fish (fresh fish with rice or potatoes) €37.50
- Ghormeh Sabzi (Persian herb stew with lamb and beans) €29.00
- DENA's Surprise (chef's daily selection) €27.50

**Desserts:**
- Bastani (Persian saffron ice cream) €7.50
- Sholeh Zard (saffron rice pudding) €6.50

**Signature drinks:**
- Saffron Beer (alcoholic and alcohol-free) €4.00
- Pomegranate Liqueur €6.95
- Persian Shiraz (glass) €8.50

## Blog

The DENA's blog publishes articles about Persian cuisine, cooking traditions, and the restaurant's story.

- Persian Fusion Explained: What It Means and Why It Works — https://dena-restaurant.com/blog/what-is-persian-fusion-cuisine.html
- What to Order at a Persian Restaurant: A Guide to DENA's Menu — https://dena-restaurant.com/blog/what-to-order-persian-restaurant-den-haag.html
- From Iran to Prinsestraat: The Story Behind DENA's — https://dena-restaurant.com/blog/the-story-behind-denas-persian-restaurant-den-haag.html
